documentation.description:
This package provides the ``memset`` function as defined by the C standard.
``memset`` calls are directly generated by the compiler to perform record
or array initializations or assignments.

subprograms.name: memset
subprograms.code:
function memset
  (M : Address; C : Integer; Size : Memory_Types.size_t) return Address

documentation.description:
This function stores ``C`` converted to a Character in each of the
elements of the array of Characters beginning at ``M``, with size
``Size``. It returns a pointer to ``M``.

If ``Size`` is greater than 0, this routine loops from 0 to
``Size`` - 1, and writes the byte ``C`` into memory starting at
address ``M``.
